name: User Directory File Time-Stomping Detected
description: Detection of unusual modification of file creation timestamps in user directories, a common defense evasion technique used by attackers to hide malicious activity.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID, expected to be 2 for FileTimeChange.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp when the file's creation time was modified.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that initiated the file time-stomp.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The process that performed the file time-stomp.

parameters.name: TargetFilename
parameters.description: The full path to the file whose creation time was modified.

parameters.name: CreationUtcTime
parameters.description: The new UTC creation time of the file.

parameters.name: OldCreationUtcTime
parameters.description: The original UTC creation time of the file.
